name: Outlook desktop: -----Original Message----- divider then From/Sent/To/Subject block

email.subject: RE: Following up
email.text:
Interested. Can you share a one-pager?

-----Original Message-----
From: Bob Smith <bob@sdr-jarvis.dev>
Sent: Monday, January 6, 2025 10:14 AM
To: Dana Lin <dana@northwind.co>
Subject: Following up

Hi Dana,

Noticed Northwind just raised a Series B — congrats. Would love to share
how we help post-Series-B teams scale outbound without hiring SDRs.

Best,
Bob
